name: Stuffed Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Cooked Long Grain White Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, brown the ground beef and drain any excess fat.
2. Add the tomato sauce, diced tomatoes (without draining), cooked rice, chopped green bell peppers, beef bouillon cubes, brown sugar, salt, and pepper to the pan.
3. Stir all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pot. Simmer for 30-40 minutes or until the peppers are tender.
6. The soup yields approximately 10 servings.
